시편 125:1.content: Those who trust in Yahweh are as Mount Zion, which can’t be moved, but remains forever.

시편 125:2.content: As the mountains surround Jerusalem, so Yahweh surrounds his people from this time forward and forever more.

시편 125:3.content: For the scepter of wickedness won’t remain over the allotment of the righteous; so that the righteous won’t use their hands to do evil.

시편 125:4.content: Do good, Yahweh, to those who are good, to those who are upright in their hearts.

시편 125:5.content: But as for those who turn away to their crooked ways, Yahweh will lead them away with the workers of iniquity. Peace be on Israel.
